query: just finished tweaking the streak card on the dashboard — can you make sure it still looks right and renders with actual data before i push? i don't want to be staring at an empty dashboard

I changed the overdue task card from a left stripe to a full border (border-l-4 -> border). before I open the PR I want to be sure it's actually showing up in the matrix and I'm not looking at a stale build again
verify the matrix still drops tasks into the right quadrants after my edit to the capture-parser — Q1 through Q4 should all place correctly
I refactored the edit-drawer in components/matrix-simplified/. confirm it still opens, edits, and saves a task correctly in the running app before I merge
can you check that the Export Data button in settings still works and doesn't throw console errors? I rewrote the export handler
made spacing changes to the quadrant-distribution donut on the dashboard, want to see it with seeded tasks not an empty state before merging
before I push this task-card change, drive the app and screenshot the matrix so I actually know it renders the way I think it does
does the new dependency badge actually render on blocked task cards? I added it to the card metadata component but I haven't seen it live yet
I think my change to lib/analytics/trends.ts broke the completion-trend chart on the dashboard. confirm whether it still renders before I ship
updated the dark-mode tokens on the capture bar — need to confirm both light and dark look correct in the real app, not just in my head
review my changes to lib/sync/pb-sync-engine.ts for race conditions and possible data-loss on the last-write-wins merge
apply the Inkwell hairline border and quadrant color tokens to this standalone HTML analysis report so it matches the app's visual system
write a failing test first for the new monthly-recurrence logic in lib/tasks.ts, then implement it red-green-refactor
verify the production deploy actually went out — check the CloudFront distribution and confirm the new build is live at the real gsd URL
run the full vitest unit suite and tell me if anything is failing on main right now
do a full WCAG AA accessibility audit of the settings page — keyboard nav, labels, contrast, the works
start the dev server and leave it running on localhost so I can poke at the app myself for a while
my PocketBase sync keeps dropping tasks on my second device — help me debug why the realtime SSE subscription isn't echoing changes
rename resolveQuadrantId to deriveQuadrant across the whole codebase and fix all the imports
explain how the service worker cache layers work in this app — what's the difference between gsd-immutable, gsd-pages, and gsd-runtime?
